words.name: Address
words.description: Used to communicate or ask about where someone lives or their place of residence. Example quiz prompt: "Which video shows the sign for 'Address'?"

words.name: Age
words.description: Used to communicate or ask about how old someone is. Example quiz prompt: "Pick the sign for 'Age'—how many birthdays have you had?"

words.name: Birthday
words.description: Used to communicate or ask about the date when someone was born. Example quiz prompt: "Which one shows the sign for 'Birthday'?"

words.name: Birthplace
words.description: Used to communicate or ask about where someone was born. Example quiz prompt: "Choose the sign for 'Birthplace'—where were you born?"

words.name: Family
words.description: Used to communicate or ask about one's family members and relationships. Example quiz prompt: "Which video shows the sign for 'Family'?"

words.name: Filipino
words.description: Used to identify or ask if someone is Filipino. Example quiz prompt: "Pick the sign for 'Filipino'—proud Pinoy!"

words.name: Nation
words.description: Used to communicate or ask about someone's nationality or country of origin. Example quiz prompt: "Which one shows the sign for 'Nation'?"

words.name: Work
words.description: Used to communicate or ask about someone's occupation or profession. Example quiz prompt: "Choose the sign for 'Work'—busy hands!"
